title: Understanding Git Workflow Quiz
description: Test your knowledge on Git version control patterns.

questions.question: Which of these is the first step in the basic Git workflow?
options: Modifying files in your working directory

questions.question: Regarding the Git workflow, what is the 'Staging Area' used for?
options: To temporarily store modified files before they are committed

questions.question: Which Git command is used to move changes from the staging area to your repository's version history?
A series of snapshots of your code's history is called a _______.
